name: IT Knowledge Base
description: Answers IT questions using your organization's SharePoint knowledge base. Ask me how to set up VPN, reset MFA, request software access, or troubleshoot common issues — I'll find the answer in your documentation.
instructions: See instructions.md for the full system prompt.

conversation_starters.text: How do I set up MFA on my new phone?
What's the process for requesting software installation?
My VPN keeps disconnecting — how do I fix this?
How do I request access to a SharePoint site?
